title: Code-knowledge index: module-map evidence.symbols writer vs this repo's version:2 format
context: AC-6 requires filling module-map evidence.symbols for the top-10 modules with comments preserved. Issue points at apply.ts/generateModuleMapYaml. Verification: apply.ts is NOT the production writer and does not preserve comments (generateModuleMapYaml does, via YAML.parseDocument). Critically, THIS repo's module-map.yml is a hand-authored version:2 format (per-module 'sources:' + 'layer:' + nested 'features:', NO 'evidence:' block, NO 'source_paths') that diverges from the standard ModuleMapEntry (source_paths + evidence) the issue and inferencer.ts assume. No file-path to module-slug helper exists.

options.label: Add a dedicated comment-preserving evidence writer (YAML.parseDocument) that detects the map format and writes evidence.symbols by matching index symbols to each module's sources/source_paths; build the missing file->slug resolver from those globs
Support only the standard ModuleMapEntry format; skip evidence.symbols on this repo's version:2 map and note the divergence (AC-6 module-map part unverifiable on this repo)
Ship reuse-catalog.md now (AC-6 part 1) and defer module-map evidence.symbols to a follow-up until the map format is unified

rationale: Format-aware comment-preserving evidence writer; match symbols to modules via sources/source_paths and build the file->slug resolver.
